title: Is this a sexual innuendo or what
display_title: Is this a sexual innuendo or what
wikitext:
[]: Is this a sexual innuendo or what!?             Quote Post by Skullraper » Wed Feb 06, 2008 11:43 pm Original Renewal I wonder how many missed it. It seems quite obvious once pointed out. At the risk of looking into it too much I wonder if it’s a visual suggestion of how Misato feels towards Shinji. Her feelings become quite clear during EoE. I’m sure no one here would deny that she’s slightly screwy.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Feb 06, 2008 11:45 pm THIS IS TEH GREATEST THING EVER DISCOVERED IN THE HISTORY OF HISTORY!!!!1 On first glance at those orginal pics, I actually thought it was.....yeah.

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Wed Feb 06, 2008 11:47 pm I agree

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Wed Feb 06, 2008 11:54 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: THIS IS TEH GREATEST THING EVER DISCOVERED IN THE HISTORY OF HISTORY!!!!1 On first glance at those orginal pics, I actually thought it was.....yeah.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Feb 07, 2008 12:00 am When was this? I can't believe I didn't notice it. This is almost Austin Powers -ish. Only here it's sophisticated and artsy.

[]:             Quote Post by Skullraper » Thu Feb 07, 2008 12:05 am NAveryW wrote: When was this? I can't believe I didn't notice it. This is almost Austin Powers -ish. Only here it's sophisticated and artsy.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Feb 07, 2008 12:13 am I bet you if we all watch that episode again, without pausing, we'll spot it right away! :3

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Feb 07, 2008 12:13 am Interesting that the chair actually looks more phallic in the original. Now, are we going to need to go back through the series and see if we can find as many examples of penes and/or "buttsex subtext" as there are of vulvae? Also, WHAT EPISODE WAS THIS?

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Thu Feb 07, 2008 12:21 am NAveryW wrote: Interesting that the chair actually looks more phallic in the original. Now, are we going to need to go back through the series and see if we can find as many examples of penes and/or "buttsex subtext" as there are of vulvae? Also, WHAT EPISODE WAS THIS?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Feb 07, 2008 12:22 am If it were a joke, I doubt it would be in Renewal at all. It means something!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Skullraper » Thu Feb 07, 2008 12:23 am NAveryW wrote: WHAT EPISODE WAS THIS?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Feb 07, 2008 12:25 am NAveryW wrote: Interesting that the chair actually looks more phallic in the original.

[]:             Quote Post by Skullraper » Thu Feb 07, 2008 12:30 am The Rebuild chair is more evocative of a penis wearing a condom. I would venture to say the suggestion was intentionally kept.

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Thu Feb 07, 2008 12:37 am Skullraper wrote: The Rebuild chair is more evocative of a penis wearing a condom. I would venture to say the suggestion was intentionally kept.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Thu Feb 07, 2008 12:38 pm Hurr hurr hurr.

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Thu Feb 07, 2008 12:49 pm Zugzwang wrote: Hurr hurr hurr.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Thu Feb 07, 2008 3:35 pm Amazingness i cant belive i missed this especially after after two lessons on phallic symbols and men and stuff. Great find

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Feb 07, 2008 5:14 pm Wow, how could I have taken those screenshots, color-corrected them, turned them into thumbnails, and put them into a webpage without noticing that? I must not be perverted enough. @Zug's ani:

[]:             Quote Post by Skullraper » Thu Feb 07, 2008 5:51 pm Reichu wrote: Wow, how could I have taken those screenshots, color-corrected them, turned them into thumbnails, and put them into a webpage without noticing that?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Feb 07, 2008 6:10 pm As the resident dirty old man of the forum, I'm ashamed to say that I didn't notice this. And sometimes a cigar is just a cigar.

At the risk of looking into it too much I wonder if it’s a visual suggestion of how Misato feels towards Shinji. Her feelings become quite clear during EoE. I’m sure no one here would deny that she’s slightly screwy.
